generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering output for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, data saving, report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleState, ObjectTracksReport, VehicleStateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC logic execution on digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlCommand
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleState, ObjectTracksReport
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data and object tracks as time-series"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time data transmission and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VehicleState : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization"
]

instance ObjectTracksReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated human-readable report of object tracks for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated human-readable report of vehicle state for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC decision logic outputs for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control command for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium retrofitted with autonomy components"
    base:contains VedderElectronicSpeedController
    base:contains SteeringServo
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:contains IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:contains JetsonOrinNano
    base:contains VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:contains SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud hardware for hosting distributed Functional Entities"
]

instance RemoteUIEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Remote UI hardware for user interface and control"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Remote commands (enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustments, emergency braking) converted to motor voltage commands and steering signals via the Actuation FE, with latency constrained to ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end network latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy across all components for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (3D visualization/control panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase during vehicle operation, supporting optimization, health monitoring, and real-time decision-making for the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system in operational conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions with ≤100 ms latency constraints."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., ACC, Data Storage) on cloud/server, User Entity on remote devices, with Data Storage external to the vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality (performance class I), and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
